\caption{Held-out empirical validation of the fitted chain on MAST-style traces.  Each framework's trace corpus is split $50/50$ BEFORE featurization; the chain is fit on the fit half, and its analytic first-passage CDF $F_{\tau_\oplus}^{\hat M}$ and reliability-decay curve $\mathcal R(d)$ are compared against the truly held-out test half.  $D_{\mathrm{KS}}$ and $p_{\mathrm{KS}}$ are the two-sample Kolmogorov\,--\,Smirnov statistic and asymptotic $p$-value; $L_\infty^{\mathrm{RDC}}$ is the sup-norm discrepancy between $\mathcal R(d)$ and the empirical success-by-$d$ rate on $d\in[0,50]$.  All seven frameworks pass the KS test at the $\alpha{=}0.05$ level.}
\label{tab:heldout-ss9}
